message:
ci(windows): set up MSVC env so Zig finds Windows SDK libs

Zig's link step on Windows fails to locate d3dcompiler.lib /
d3d12.lib / dxgi.lib (Windows SDK system libraries that Dawn's
static webgpu_dawn.lib references). Zig only searches paths given
explicitly via `-L`, plus whatever the LIB env var points to when
targeting MSVC ABI. Without MSVC env, LIB is unset.

Add ilammy/msvc-dev-cmd@v1 to the Windows job in test.yml /
bench.yml / release.yml. It runs vcvars64.bat in the runner's
shell and exports LIB, INCLUDE, PATH for subsequent steps. No-op
on Linux/Mac (gated by `runner.os == 'Windows'`).

files.patch:
@@ -49,6 +49,14 @@ jobs:
         shell: pwsh
         run: choco install -y cmake ninja
 
+      # Set up MSVC env so Zig finds the Windows SDK system libraries
+      # (d3dcompiler.lib, d3d12.lib, dxgi.lib — required by Dawn's
+      # static webgpu_dawn.lib). Sets LIB / INCLUDE / PATH for the rest
+      # of the job. Runner-only step; no-op on Linux/Mac.
+      - name: Setup MSVC env (Windows)
+        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
+        uses: ilammy/msvc-dev-cmd@v1
+
       - name: Cache Dawn
         if: matrix.backend == 'dawn'
         id: dawn-cache

@@ -62,6 +62,14 @@ jobs:
         shell: pwsh
         run: choco install -y cmake ninja
 
+      # Set up MSVC env so Zig finds the Windows SDK system libraries
+      # (d3dcompiler.lib, d3d12.lib, dxgi.lib — required by Dawn's
+      # static webgpu_dawn.lib). Sets LIB / INCLUDE / PATH for the rest
+      # of the job. Runner-only step; no-op on Linux/Mac.
+      - name: Setup MSVC env (Windows)
+        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
+        uses: ilammy/msvc-dev-cmd@v1
+
       - name: Cache Dawn build
         if: matrix.backend == 'dawn'
         id: dawn-cache

@@ -77,6 +77,14 @@ jobs:
           # the Dawn-only Windows build but doesn't hurt).
           # choco install -y vulkan-sdk  # optional
 
+      # Set up MSVC env so Zig finds the Windows SDK system libraries
+      # (d3dcompiler.lib, d3d12.lib, dxgi.lib — required by Dawn's
+      # static webgpu_dawn.lib). Sets LIB / INCLUDE / PATH for the rest
+      # of the job. Runner-only step; no-op on Linux/Mac.
+      - name: Setup MSVC env (Windows)
+        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
+        uses: ilammy/msvc-dev-cmd@v1
+
       # ── Dawn (Windows only — Mac uses Metal-direct, Linux uses Vulkan-direct) ──
       - name: Cache Dawn build
         if: matrix.backend == 'dawn'
